title: Epic: remediate CLI P0 review findings
description:
Track the P0 remediation plan from docs/plans/2026-07-02-cli-p0-remediation.md.

Scope:
- Fix global CLI contract bugs: no-color errors, quiet version, PORT_CONFIG_FILE, compare output validation, config permissions.
- Harden destructive command safety for clear.
- Diagnose and fix compare vs migrate dry-run inconsistency.
- Add actionable identifiers to migration dry-run output.

Non-goals:
- Full API command refactor.
- Full help redesign.
- Live destructive testing.
acceptance_criteria: All child P0 remediation issues are complete; docs/reviews/cli-review-findings-2026-07-02.md is updated with resolved/follow-up status; go test ./... and make build pass.
close_reason: All P0 remediation child tasks complete

title: CLI P0: fix global flag/config contract guardrails
description:
Implement the first P0 PR from docs/plans/2026-07-02-cli-p0-remediation.md.

Fixes:
- --no-color on error output.
- --quiet behavior for port version.
- PORT_CONFIG_FILE precedence.
- compare --output enum validation.
- config files written with 0600 permissions.

Add regression tests before/with implementation. Keep changes local and non-networked.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid command with --no-color emits no ANSI; port --quiet version follows the tested quiet contract; PORT_CONFIG_FILE is honored below --config and above default; compare --output invalid exits non-zero before network/file work; new config writes use 0600 on Unix; go test ./... passes.
close_reason: Implemented global flag/config guardrails with regression tests

title: CLI P0: harden clear confirmation and non-interactive safety
description:
Implement the second P0 PR from docs/plans/2026-07-02-cli-p0-remediation.md.

Fixes:
- clear honors global --yes / -y in addition to --force.
- clear fails non-zero in non-interactive mode when a prompt would be required.
- Prompt behavior is testable and uses existing prompt helpers where possible.

Do not run live destructive operations.
acceptance_criteria: port clear --entities --yes and -y skip confirmation; port clear --entities < /dev/null exits non-zero unless --force/--yes is provided; tests cover force/yes/non-interactive paths without live deletions; go test ./... passes.
close_reason: Implemented clear confirmation and non-interactive safety

title: CLI P0: resolve compare vs migrate dry-run diff inconsistency
description:
Implement the third P0 PR from docs/plans/2026-07-02-cli-p0-remediation.md.

Problem:
Live compare reported the base and target orgs as identical, but migrate --dry-run --skip-entities reported one blueprint create and one blueprint-permission update.

Work:
- Reproduce with sanitized fixtures if possible.
- Identify whether compare misses a resource category/normalization or migration dry-run over-reports.
- Align compare and migration dry-run for equivalent data.
- Add fixture regression tests.

Do not expose live credentials or perform live writes.
acceptance_criteria: Equivalent fixture data produces zero compare diffs and zero migrate dry-run creates/updates; live mismatch cause is explained in PR notes without secrets; no live writes are used; go test ./... passes.
close_reason: Aligned compare and migrate dry-run behavior; live dry-run now agrees

title: CLI P0: add identifiers to migration dry-run output
description:
Implement the fourth P0 PR from docs/plans/2026-07-02-cli-p0-remediation.md.

Add actionable identifiers to migration dry-run output while preserving existing summary counts.

At minimum include identifiers for:
- blueprints to create
- blueprints to update
- blueprint permissions to update

Expose details in JSON output and in text output when --verbose is passed.
acceptance_criteria: migrate --dry-run --output-format json includes actionable identifiers for non-zero blueprint and blueprint-permission counts; migrate --dry-run --verbose shows identifiers in text mode; existing summary count fields remain; tests cover JSON and verbose text; go test ./... passes.
close_reason: Added migration dry-run detail identifiers to JSON and verbose text

title: CLI P1: remediate review findings
description: Implement remaining P1 findings from docs/reviews/cli-review-findings-2026-07-02.md: format validation, export JSON summary shape, api call docs/unwrap, invalid-org suggestions, release lint gate, lint config tightening, and OAuth callback server hardening.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./... and make build pass; PR opened for review.
close_reason: P1 findings implemented and PR #100 opened
